◎简　　介

　　Follows the lives of Rebecca, a US Postal Inspector, and her wheelchair-bound son Preston. Now home life and professional life collide when Preston becomes an anonymous tipster bent on helping his mother bring criminals to justice. The Inspectors will also present disability issues in an empowering way, and tackle important social issues.

◎简　　介

　　"Inside Greenpeace - Was braucht es, um die Welt zu retten?" is a documentary series on sky.
　　They are the exact opposite of the “Planet Killers”: For the high-end-docuseries “Inside Greenpeace”, the filmmakers follow the footsteps of Greenpeace activists.
　　It is not easy as a fighter for the environment: just courted by the public after dangerous actions over soccer stadiums already demonized again. This is also made clear by the documentary series commissioned by Sky, which not only follows spectacular actions up close, but also allows critics to have their say . Among other things, on the icebreaker  "Arctic Sunrise", side by side with courageous activists, but also behind the scenes of the organization, the series, realized with high production effort, shows what it means to break the rules in the service of nature. No other film team has been closer to the legendary environmental organization. The result not only guarantees spectacular and evocative images, but also wants to be understood by Sky as a contribution to the environment and climate protection. To that we join gladly: Act now!
　　PRODUCTION: Constantin Dokumentation, M.E. Works, Sky Studios

◎简　　介
　　白芍（霍思燕 饰）、白芨（陶慧 饰）和白苏（周楚楚 饰）是情同手足的三姐妹，母亲在早年间离开了她们，三个姑娘由父亲白守城（施羽 饰）一手拉车养大。白守成爱女心切，一心希望能够替女儿们安排一个好的前程，但很显然，三个姑娘们对待幸福有着截然不同的定义。

　　白芍爱上了名为陆六安（王阳明 饰）的男子，虽然陆六安年纪要比白芍小，而且现居国外，但白芍对这段跨国姐弟恋还是十分的有信心。白芨早早的结了婚，但却遭遇了婚姻危机，遭到了丈夫的背叛。白苏在一次偶然中认识了整容医生任海龙（谭凯 饰），后者的年龄并没有令古灵精怪的白苏望而却步。
